title: monardella stoneana
intro: Monardella stoneana, also known as Stone's Monardella or Purple Fairy Candles, is a rare, fragrant, and perennial herb native to California in the United States. It belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Monardella stoneana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
